description: The 'Ndrina Pane is a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta from Belcastro, Calabria, Italy. It operates in several towns including Belcastro, Albi, Taverna, Magisano, and Sersale. The group is involved in international drug trafficking, usury, arms trafficking, and money laundering. It is allied with other 'ndrine such as the Grande Aracri and Mannolo of Cutro.
